title: Craftable
description: Craft the impossible with almost 50 new recipes! (Mounts of Mayhem Support!)
body:
Craftable lets you craft uncraftable items, easier recipes, and QOL features.
You can craft:
- Arrow Bundle (3 of each material makes 20 arrows)
- Chainmail Armor
- Creeper Head
- Crying Obsidian
- Dirt Path
- Smelt Diorite to Quartz
- Dragon Breath
- Echo Shard
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Craft copper doors and trapdoors to aged variants
- Gilded Blackstone
- Smelt Raw Ore Blocks to Iron/Gold/Copper Blocks
- Smelt Granite to Quartz
- Heart of the Sea
- Heavy Core
- Honey Bottle (Alt recipe)
- Smelt Mycelium into Leather
- Magma Block (Alt recipe)
- Mycelium
- Oak Leaves
- Oak Planks
- Pale Moss Block
- Piglin Head
- Pink Tulip
- Red Tulip
- Reinforced Deepslate
- Saddle
- Sand
- Skeleton Head
- Tuff
- Wither Skull
- Zombie Head
- Pottery Sherds
- Smelt any Anvil to Iron Block

All the recipes are below.

<details>
  <summary>Recipes</summary>

<details>
  <summary> Arrow Bundle</summary>
  Makes 20
  
  Place flint at the top, sticks in the middle, and feathers at the bottom in columns.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Chainmail Boots</summary>
  Makes 1
  
  Arrange iron nuggets in an inverted 'T' and place iron ingots at the sides of the bottom row.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Chainmail Chestplate</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Arrange iron ingots in the shape of a chestplate with iron nuggets at the sides.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Chainmail Helmet</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Arrange iron nuggets in the shape of a helmet, with an iron ingot in the center top.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Chainmail Leggings</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Arrange iron ingots at the top and iron nuggets in the sides.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Copper Block</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Smelt a raw copper block.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Creeper Head</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround a block of stone with gunpowder.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Crying Obsidian</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround an obsidian block with ghast tears in a plus shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Dirt Path</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Surround wheat with dirt.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Diorite and Granite to Quartz</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Smelt a block of diorite or granite.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Dragon Breath</summary>
  Makes 1  
  Place an ender eye at the top, a glass bottle in the middle, and an ender pearl at the bottom.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Echo Shard</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround an amethyst shard with sculk veins in a plus shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Enchanted Golden Apple</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround an apple with gold blocks and fill the corners with gold ingots.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Exposed Copper Door</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Use exposed copper or waxed exposed copper surrounded by copper doors or waxed copper doors.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Exposed Copper Trapdoor</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Surround exposed copper or waxed exposed copper with copper trapdoors or waxed copper trapdoors.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Gilded Blackstone</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Surround a gold ingot with blackstone.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Gold Block</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Smelt a raw gold block.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Heart of the Sea</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround a sea lantern with prismarine blocks.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Heavy Core</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround an iron block with netherite ingots in a plus shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Honey Bottle</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Combine a honeycomb and a glass bottle.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Iron Block</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Smelt a raw iron block.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Leather from Mushrooms</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Smelt mycelium for leather.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Magma Block</summary>
  Makes 5 
  
  Place blaze powder in the corners and netherrack in the plus shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Mycelium</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Surround a mushroom (red or brown) with dirt.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Oak Leaves</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Surround an apple with short grass.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Oak Planks</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Arrange sticks in a 2x2 square.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Pale Moss Block</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Combine a moss block with bone meal.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Piglin Head</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround a block of stone with raw porkchops :)
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Pink Tulip</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Combine a white tulip with pink dye.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Red Tulip</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Combine a white tulip with red dye.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Reinforced Deepslate</summary>
  Makes 3  
  
  Use a smithing table with a bone block template, a base of deepslate, and an addition of obsidian.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Saddle</summary>
  Makes 1 
  
  Arrange leather in a 3x2 with string in the center, and copper ingots at the sides of the bottom row.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Sand</summary>
  Makes 4 
  
  Combine two blocks of dirt with two blocks of sand.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Skeleton Head</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround a block of stone with bones.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Tuff</summary>
  Makes 4  
  
  Combine two stone blocks and two deepslate blocks.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Weathered Copper Door</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Use weathered copper or waxed weathered copper with copper doors or waxed copper doors.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Waxed Oxidized Copper Trapdoor</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Surround oxidized copper or waxed oxidized copper with copper trapdoors or waxed copper trapdoors.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Waxed Weathered Copper Trapdoor</summary>
  Makes 8  
  
  Surround weathered copper or waxed weathered copper with copper trapdoors or waxed copper trapdoors.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Wither Skull</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Use wither roses in the top row, bones in the bottom two rows, and then replace the center with a piece of coal.
</details>

<details>
  <summary> Zombie Head</summary>
  Makes 1  
  
  Surround a block of stone with rotten flesh.
</details>




<details>
<summary>Sherds</summary>


<details>
  <summary>Angler Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To craft the Angler Pottery Sherd, position a fishing rod in the center of the crafting grid. Then place bricks on all other slots to surround it in a plus formation.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Archer Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  For an Archer Pottery Sherd, place a bow in the center slot. Use bricks to fill the remaining slots around the bow in a plus formation.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Arms Up Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To craft Arms Up Pottery Sherd, place an armor stand in the center slot. Surround it with bricks on all the edges, forming a plus shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Blade Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  Position any kind of sword in the middle slot. Use bricks to fill the other spots around the sword in a cross formation to create the Blade Pottery Sherd.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Brewer Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  For Brewer Pottery Sherd, a glass bottle should be placed in the middle slot. Surround it with bricks on all sides in a plus shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Burn Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To produce Burn Pottery Sherd, position blaze powder in the center. Use bricks to create a surrounding cross pattern.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Danger Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To construct the Danger Pottery Sherd, place a creeper head in the middle. All other slots need to be filled with bricks, forming a cross around the head.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Explorer Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  In the center, place either a map or a filled map. Surround the map with bricks to form the Explorer Pottery Sherd.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Flow Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  For making Flow Pottery Sherd, position chiseled tuff in the center slot of the grid and surround it with bricks on all sides in a cross pattern.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Friend Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  For crafting Friend Pottery Sherd, position an emerald in the middle of the crafting grid. Fill all other slots with bricks in a plus formation.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Guster Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To create a Guster Pottery Sherd, put a breeze rod in the middle slot. Enclose it with bricks in a plus formation.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Heart Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  Position red dye in the center slot. Use bricks to fill up the rest of the slots around it, arranged in a plus pattern to get Heart Pottery Sherd.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Heartbreak Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  Use black dye in the center of the grid. Place bricks around it in all other spots, forming a cross pattern for the Heartbreak Pottery Sherd.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Howl Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To craft Howl Pottery Sherd, place a bone in the middle slot of the crafting grid. Surround it with bricks on all sides in a plus shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Miner Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  Place any type of pickaxe in the center of the crafting grid. Surround it with bricks in a plus pattern to craft the Miner Pottery Sherd.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Mourner Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  Use a sculk catalyst in the center slot and enclose it with bricks on the other slots in a cross pattern to craft the Mourner Pottery Sherd.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Plenty Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To produce Plenty Pottery Sherd, place a chest in the center. Surround it with bricks on all sides to form the cross shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Prize Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To create Prize Pottery Sherd, place a diamond in the middle slot. Enclose it with bricks all over the surrounding slots in a cross shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Scrape Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  Place any type of axe in the middle slot. Surround it with bricks in all other slots in a cross arrangement to create Scrape Pottery Sherd.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Sheaf Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To make a Sheaf Pottery Sherd, position wheat in the center slot of the crafting grid. Fill all surrounding slots with bricks, forming a cross around the wheat.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Shelter Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To obtain a Shelter Pottery Sherd, place an acacia sapling in the center. Use bricks to fill up the other slots surrounding the sapling in a cross layout.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Skull Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To craft Skull Pottery Sherd, put a skeleton skull in the center of the crafting grid. Use bricks to fill surrounding slots, forming a cross shape.
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Snort Pottery Sherd Recipe</summary>
  Makes 4
  
  To craft Snort Pottery Sherd, you need to place a sniffer egg in the middle slot of the crafting grid. Surround it with bricks on all sides, like in a plus shape.
</details>

</details>

</details>
